title: kalabotis moly
intro: Kalabotis moly, also known as Silver Ragwort or Wooly Ragwort, is a flowering plant that belongs to the aster family (Asteraceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Kalabotis moly include its potential to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with recommended dosages varying depending on the intended use and individual needs.
